name: Buttermilk Chocolate-Hazelnut Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. In a mixing bowl, combine the buttermilk, safflower oil, egg whites, and vanilla extract. Beat together with an electric mixer until well blended.
3. In another bowl, whisk together the light brown sugar, whole wheat pastry flour, baking soda, salt, and chopped hazelnuts.
4. Add the dry ingredients to the wet mixture a bit at a time, mixing continuously with the electric mixer until smooth.
5. Grease a 9-inch cake pan with safflower oil.
6. Sprinkle the bottom of the pan with whole wheat pastry flour.
7. Pour half of the batter into the pan, then sprinkle evenly with half of the chopped hazelnuts.
8. Pour in the remaining batter and top with the remaining hazelnuts.
9. Bake for 25 to 30 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
